mapper.select: SELECT * FROM (SELECT DISTINCT CASE WHEN CNT = 1 THEN C.VC_FUND_CODE_GP3 WHEN CNT > 1 AND D.PORT_CODE IS NOT NULL THEN D.PORT_CODE WHEN CNT > 1 AND D.PORT_CODE IS NULL THEN E.PORT_CODE END AS PORT_CODE, C.VC_FUND_ID_O32 AS L_FUND_ID FROM (SELECT DISTINCT VC_FUND_CODE_GP3, COUNT(DISTINCT VC_FUND_CODE_GP3) OVER(PARTITION BY VC_FUND_ID_O32) CNT, VC_FUND_ID_O32 FROM PRT_PORTINFO WHERE VC_FUND_CODE_GP3 IS NOT NULL AND VC_FUND_ID_O32 IS NOT NULL) C LEFT JOIN (SELECT PORT_CODE, SUB_PORT_CODE FROM TKZC_PORT_TOGETHER_MAPPING WHERE LENGTH(PORT_CODE) = 6) D ON C.VC_FUND_CODE_GP3 = D.SUB_PORT_CODE LEFT JOIN (SELECT PORT_CODE FROM TPRT WHERE P_TYPE = '12' AND (MATURITY_DATE IS NULL OR MATURITY_DATE > TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD'))) E ON E.PORT_CODE = C.VC_FUND_CODE_GP3) WHERE PORT_CODE IS NOT NULL AND L_FUND_ID = #{id,jdbcType=VARCHAR}
